texto: The author's projected intellectual climate nearly 500 years in the future proclaims itself too pragmatic to consider living well as important as material satisfaction. This reminds us, ironically, that choosing NOT to consider life's deeper questions is in itself a choice with profound and lasting consequences.
explicacao: Citação de Bryan M. Litfin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The author's projected intellectual climate nearly 500 years in the future proclaims itself too p…” articula vida, materialism, philosophy em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como philosophy e pragmatism.

texto: There is no greater catalyst for change in a man than a woman. To love a woman is to become a new kind of man, in one direction or another. A woman holds sway over all. The right woman can assume command of your every part of your being, both body and soul. Her conquest will be total.
explicacao: Citação de Bryan M. Litfin sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There is no greater catalyst for change in a man than a woman. To love a woman is to become a new…” articula reflexao, love, woman em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e woman.

texto: For a long time, Maurice rubbed his shaved head in his palm, until at last he looked up at his student. "Teo, I think you have to let Deu be the God he is, not the god you want him to be.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Bryan M. Litfin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “For a long time, Maurice rubbed his shaved head in his palm, until at last he looked up at his st…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, christian, christianity, útil em momentos de christianity e fiction.

texto: So you see, the most vital question then becomes, what type of woman will conquer our hero? If she be of poor quality, he’ll become a slave. But if she be great, then her greatness will elevate the man to greater heights than he could ever have attained on his own.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bryan M. Litfin que provoca temas ligados a amor. Ao questionar “So you see, the most vital question then becomes, what type of woman will conquer our hero? If sh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, hero, love, com foco em love e men.
